subcodes.first_line: We have answered thee and made mention of thee time and time again. Thus do We mention thee once more, that thou mayest be assured of God's grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اجبناک و ذکرناک مره بعد مره اذا نذکرک تاره اخری لتکون مطمئنا بعنایه الله
subcodes.subjects: @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement
